actions.instruction: No risk assets in latest allocation; keep capital in USDT/cash-equivalent.
Re-run switcher daily. Deploy only when non-cash allocation appears for active profile.

guardrails.instruction: If BTC close remains below SMA200 and 60-day drawdown worsens, force profile to stable_shield.
If live drawdown exceeds strategy 120-day drawdown by 30%, cut risk exposure to 0.

instructions: Do not open risk positions until allocation leaves 100% USDT.
Guardrail[regime_risk]: If BTC close remains below SMA200 and 60-day drawdown worsens, force profile to stable_shield.
Guardrail[risk_budget]: If live drawdown exceeds strategy 120-day drawdown by 30%, cut risk exposure to 0.
switch_command: /opt/miniconda3/bin/python3 /Users/rongts/.agents/skills/crypto-balanced-strategy/scripts/profile_switcher.py --capital-cny 10000.0 --confirmations 2 --check-window 120 --signal-window 365 --short-threshold -0.03 --shield-threshold -0.015 --risk-mode auto --base-profile stable --short-profile stable_short_balanced --shield-profile stable_shield --symbols BTCUSDT,ETHUSDT,SOLUSDT,BNBUSDT,LINKUSDT --regime-symbol BTCUSDT --limit 1000 --cache-ttl-hours 6
